stemHtml: Regarding pavement strength, you are at the apron prior to taxi-out and assess your aircraft ACN to be 45. – According to the aerodrome chart, the reported PCN for the taxiway you have to take is 50. – Are you allowed to taxi on that taxiway?

options.a: Yes, but this will result in an overload pavement operation.
options.b: No, a specific waiver from the aerodrome operator is needed.
options.c: No, the bearing capacity of the taxiway is too low.
options.d: Yes, use of the taxiway is allowed.
